posts.content: I used to believe this and then I saw the budget requested for a traditional chemistry grant.

I voluntarily read plenty of LLM output, but there should be consent. My default assumption when I read text is it reflects a human's thoughts, and it gives me the ick to realize half a line in that it doesn't.

interestSummary: Naomi Saphra is actively promoting her HiLD event at the ICML 2024 conference while maintaining her core research focus on understanding and improving NLP model training, specifically how structures and mechanistic behaviors emerge. She also expresses critical views on LLM-generated text and the funding of traditional science.
